p2p_enrich.notes: Added 6 p2p tests from ClickHouse CI checks (check_cpp.sh, various_checks.sh, check_style.py). CI commands discovered: style checks (no tabs, no trailing whitespace, no CRLF, no BOM, no duplicate includes, Allman braces enforcement). Full build/test suite skipped - requires git submodules (not initialized in Docker image) and takes hours. clang-format check skipped - base commit already has formatting diffs. All 6 p2p tests pass on both base and fixed versions.
